sales.long_name: HUD-Held Multifamily and Healthcare Loan Sale 2026-DEMO
ineligibility_summary: Mortgagor or healthcare operator with respect to any Loan in this sale, or Active Shareholder
Mortgagor/operator with default or violation on any other HUD multifamily/healthcare loan
Debarred or suspended from doing business with HUD
Federal employee or member of household
Person who performed services for HUD on these loans within 24 months prior

pools.stratification_basis: Asset class: Multifamily; UPB tier: Large (>= $5M); Geography: National
Asset class: Multifamily; UPB tier: Mid ($1M-$5M); Geography: National
Asset class: Multifamily; UPB tier: Small (<$1M); Includes cross-collateralized loans
pools.notes: Pool contains cross-collateralized loans (Cando Apartments + Sheyenne Apartments). Loans must be acquired together.

pools.stratification_basis: Asset class: Healthcare (Nursing Home + Assisted Living)
pools.notes: Healthcare-experienced bidder strongly recommended. Properties include nursing home and assisted living facilities.

bidders.test_scenario: Strong institutional bidder; should pass all checks; expected to bid Pools 1 and 2

bidders.entity_name: Sage Healthcare Real Estate Trust, Inc.
bidders.qualification_basis: Investment company / REIT under Investment Company Act 1940
bidders.test_scenario: Healthcare specialist; expected to bid Pool 4 only

bidders.review_notes: Related-party screening flagged a possible match on principal's prior LP interest in HUD multifamily property. Awaiting clarification from bidder.
bidders.test_scenario: First-time HUD bidder; clarification request workflow; expected to bid Pool 2

bidders.qualification_basis: Bank as defined in Section 3(a)(2) of the Securities Act of 1933
bidders.test_scenario: Large bank bidder; broad pool interest; expected aggressive bidding across pools

bidders.rejection_reason: Mortgagor in Loan Sale: Bidder is identified as Related Party to Cando Apartments (FHA #094-38008S), included in Pool 3. Per Qualification Statement Section II, mortgagors of loans in this sale are ineligible.

screening.hud_program_match_detail: Tax ID matches current borrower of FHA #094-38008S (Cando Apartments) included in this sale

bidders.test_scenario: Disqualified bidder (mortgagor in sale); tests rejection workflow and screening engine match logic
